chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 387 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 09.10.2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present in person and has filed, through a statement certified true copy of order dated 02.10.2023 passed by learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate (Family Court), Ghotki disposing of applications U/S 345 & 345 CrPC, whereby applicant has been acquitted. Learned DPG has also produced a computer-generated case diary confirming the same fact. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is dismissed having become infructuous and surety stands discharged. Office is directed to return the same after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
